name: Christina Ferrare's Pumpkin Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the gelatin with cold water (if using powder) or soak the sheet in cold water for about 5 minutes. Stir until completely dissolved.
2. Add milk to the gelatin mixture and heat over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until it starts to bubble gently.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the pumpkin puree until well combined.
4. Let the mixture cool slightly, then gently fold in the beaten egg yolks.
5. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites with salt until they form stiff peaks.
6. Gradually add the sugar to the egg whites, beating continuously until smooth.
7. Gently fold the pumpkin mixture into the egg white batter until fully incorporated.
8. Fold in the whipped cream and remaining egg whites until just combined.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared graham cracker crust and spread evenly.
10. Chill the pie for at least 2 hours before serving.
11. Serve with additional whipped cream, if desired.
